_comment: Generated by tools/gen-vectors.mjs from web/game-core.mjs. Do not hand-edit.

iron_tawa.name: Iron Tawa
iron_tawa.text: +30 flavor if the dish has 3+ ingredients

mint_garnish.name: Mint Garnish
mint_garnish.text: +4 heat if the dish contains a Sour ingredient

salt_cellar.name: Salt Cellar
salt_cellar.text: +3 heat if the dish contains a Salty ingredient

honey_jar.name: Honey Jar
honey_jar.text: +25 flavor if the dish contains a Sweet ingredient

stock_pot.name: Stock Pot
stock_pot.text: +2 heat if the dish contains an Umami ingredient

big_spoon.name: Big Spoon
big_spoon.text: +20 flavor if the recipe is a Pair

rice_cooker.name: Rice Cooker
rice_cooker.text: +30 flavor if the recipe is Three of a Kind

tandoor.name: Tandoor
tandoor.text: ×1.5 heat if every ingredient is Spicy

wok.name: Wok
wok.text: ×1.5 heat if all ingredients share a flavor family

chai_stall.name: Chai Stall
chai_stall.text: +2 coins when you cook a Pair

butchers_block.name: Butcher's Block
butchers_block.text: +40 flavor if the recipe is Full House or better

ice_box.name: Ice Box
ice_box.text: First dish of each service gets ×2 heat

clay_handi.name: Clay Handi
clay_handi.text: Last dish of each service gets ×3 heat

grandmother_ladle.name: Grandmother's Ladle
grandmother_ladle.text: Copies the effect of the utensil to its right

emperors_wok.name: Emperor's Wok
emperors_wok.text: ×2 heat if the dish uses 5 ingredients
